title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 64.463 - Dumping in unlicensed area prohibited
text:
64.463.  Dumping in unlicensed area prohibited. — No person shall dispose of any ashes, garbage, rubbish or refuse at any place except a disposal area licensed as provided in sections 64.460 to 64.487.
(L. 1955 p. 348 § 2)
